name: 2026-05-19 Political Commentary PNP Investigating PNP TH
description:
3:03 AM, Thursday. A van exits the Senate gate. A police vehicle follows it out. Inside the van, reportedly: a senator with an ICC arrest warrant against him.

The PNP is now investigating the PNP. The impeachment court convenes down the hall.

Para kanino ang batas?

Sovereignty resides in the people.
The Republic was not consulted.

3:03 AM, Thursday. A van exits the Senate gate. A police vehicle follows it out. Inside the van, reportedly: a senator with an ICC arrest warrant against him.

The PNP is now investigating the PNP. The impeachment court convenes down the hall.

Para kanino ang batas?

Sovereignty resides in the people.
The Republic was not consulted.

PNP Chief Police General Melencio Nartatez Jr. announced on May 17, 2026 an internal probe into allegations that a white PNP-marked vehicle escorted a black van believed to have carried Sen. Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa out of the Senate at ~3:03 AM on Thursday, May 14, 2026. Dela Rosa was under Senate protective custody after NBI agents attempted to serve an ICC arrest warrant against him on May 11. Reported by GMA News, Philstar, Manila Bulletin, Manila Times, PNA, Sun Star, Cebu Daily News, PTV News.
